citations.narrative:
The facility did not submit their USDA FY25 Annual Report to the Deputy Administrator on or before the extended
deadline due date of 12/31/25.
Per this Section, facilities that use or intend to use live animals for teaching shall submit an annual report, that covers the
numbers of animals used during the previous Federal fiscal year, to the Deputy Administrator on or before the December
due date within this Subchapter of the AWA.
Timely submission of the annual report is essential to provide an accurate accounting of the total number of animals used
and to ensure that professionally acceptable standards governing the care and use of animals were followed during the
previous Federal fiscal year reporting period. Correct by May 19, 2026
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative.
n

narrative:
2.36(a) 
   
Annual report. 
The facility did not submit their USDA FY25 Annual Report to the Deputy Administrator on or before the extended 
deadline due date of 12/31/25. 
 
Per this Section, facilities that use or intend to use live animals for teaching shall submit an annual report, that covers the 
numbers of animals used during the previous Federal fiscal year, to the Deputy Administrator on or before the December 
due date within this Subchapter of the AWA.  
 
Timely submission of the annual report is essential to provide an accurate accounting of the total number of animals used 
and to ensure that professionally acceptable standards governing the care and use of animals were followed during the 
previous Federal fiscal year reporting period. Correct by May 19, 2026 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative.
